Raised Right. Tastes Out of This World. 👽

🦆 Duck Egg Update from Roswell Family Farm 🥚❤️

Our duck eggs are temporarily on hold while we give our mama ducks the chance to do what they do best—hatch the next generation of fluffy ducklings! 🐥

Watching nature take its course is something we truly value here on the farm, and we’re excited to welcome some new little quackers soon.

We appreciate everyone’s patience and understanding while our ducks focus on growing the future of our flock. We’ll let everyone know as soon as fresh duck eggs are available again!

Thank you for supporting local farming and following along on this adventure. We can’t wait to introduce you to the newest members of the Roswell Family Farm family! 💚

👽 Roswell Family Farm
Abducted by Flavor
